---
title: "CV"
page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<div style="margin-top: 4.5rem; margin-bottom: 1rem; text-align: center;">
```
[Download the shortened CV](CV/CV2026_AliciaFranco-Martinez.pdf){.btn .btn-primary target="_blank" download="CV2026_AliciaFranco-Martinez.pdf"}
```{=html}
</div>
```

```{=html}
<iframe src="CV/CV2026_AliciaFranco-Martinez.pdf" width="92%" height="820" style="display:block; margin:0 auto; border: 1px solid rgba(150,176,196,.35); border-radius: 12px;"></iframe>
```
